line_1: Now beautiful, beneath the heaven's gray arch,
line_2: Appeared the main battalion's moving march;

line_1: Circling the swamp, now draws its various arch;
line_2: Part seen, part lost; the long illustrious march

line_1: The winged vapours up the aerial arch,
line_2: AQUATIC NYMPHS! — YOU lead with viewless march

line_1: Altho' his hair began to arch,
line_2: He whistl'd up lord Lenox' march,
